heading: Cross references
label: 7655 Cross references
notes: References in TextThe Federal Insurance Contributions Act, referred to in subsec. (a)(2), is , §§ 3101, 3102, 3111, 3112, 3121 to 3128, , which is classified generally to chapter 21 (§ 3101 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 415section 3128 of this title

Amendments1990—Subsec. (a)(2), (3). , substituted period for semicolon at end of par. (2) and struck out par. (3) which cross-referenced former chapter 37 relating to tax on sugar.Pub. L. 101–508, § 11801(c)(22)(E)(i)Subsec. (b)(2), (3). , substituted period for semicolon at end of par. (2) and struck out par. (3) which cross-referenced former section 6418(b) relating to the exportation of sugar to Puerto Rico.Pub. L. 101–508, § 11801(c)(22)(E)(ii)1986—Subsec. (b). added par. (1) and redesignated former pars. (1) and (2) as (2) and (3), respectively.Pub. L. 99–5141976—Subsec. (a)(3), (5). substituted “Chapter 37” for “Subchapter A of chapter 37” in par. (5) and redesignated par. (5) as (3).Pub. L. 94–4551970—Subsec. (a)(3), (4). struck out pars. (3) and (4) relating to taxes in respect of narcotic drugs and taxes in respect of marihuana, respectively, and making references to parts I and III of subchapter A of chapter 39 and to parts II and III of subchapter A of chapter 39, respectively.Pub. L. 91–5131958—Subsec. (a)(5), (6). redesignated par. (6) as (5) and struck out former par. (5) which contained a cross reference to chapter 51 of this title.Pub. L. 85–859

children.heading: Imposition of tax in possessions
children.label: a Imposition of tax in possessions

children.text: Chapter 21, relating to the tax under the Federal Insurance Contributions Act.
Section 931, relating to income tax on residents of Guam, American Samoa, or the Northern Mariana Islands;
Section 933, relating to income tax on residents of Puerto Rico.
